All puzzles across all nine games have been basic arithmetic, and every player's answer has been correct without exception. This is the proven dominant strategy.
reasoning.C:

Everyone escapes with minimal coin loss. My puzzle answer (32 ÷ 4 = 8) is simple arithmetic. Spending 1 coin (4→3) to verify Q1 is the optimal play — it builds the multi-endorsement consensus that gives B the confidence to volunteer immediately, avoiding the dangerous random elimination. Seven consecutive Round 1 victories confirm this is the right strategy. No reason to deviate.
